issues: Missing recommendation_block field - must have formatted text with header, keyword scores, recommended resume, confidence, top signals, and why section
Missing resume_code field - should be 'EE' based on recommendation.recommended
Output structure does not match judge validation schema
message:
Please fix the following issues and rewrite 001-output.json:
1. Format recommendation data into recommendation_block string (see apply.md format)
2. Add resume_code field with value matching the recommended resume
3. Ensure all required fields match judge validation schema
